titleStmt.title: SII 27.343: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 343. (A.R. No. 251 of 1931-32.) KACHCHŪRU, (KŌṬAKĒRI) UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab lying near the hōmakuṇḍa in the Pañchaliṅgēśvara temple.
This fragmentary record registers a gift of paddy and money to the deities, Sōmanāthadēva of Maṇigārakeṟi, Mādhavadēva and Pañchaliṅgadēva and to several temple servants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lu mūḍe 30
ṭhāu makkimara nela
la pāṣāṇa siddhasādhya yakṣa Āgāmi yi bāḷa catussī
ḻaguḷa hā hakkalu ce tipeyēnuḷaṁthā sarvva sā
yi bāḷagēṇiya bhatta bārakūra ge batada hāneyalu
mūḍe 1 hāne 40 lekkadalu bhatta mūḍe 225 kaṁ maṇigāṟa
kēriya Oḷaguḷa śrīsōmanātha dēvarige bhatta mūḍe 85 nuḷiye śuddha bhattamū
ḍe 140 kkaṁ vivara mādhava dēvara naṁdādīvige 1 kkaṁ varuṣa 1 kkaṁ yeṁ vā
ra 5 kkaṁ bhatta mūḍe dēvara dīvaḷige habbakke baṁdu dinada
bhattamūḍe 12 A dīvige Eṁṇe hāḍa 3 kkaṁ
bhatta hāḍiya Oḷapauḷiya dīvige yeṁṇe hāḍa
14 kkaṁ bhattamūḍe 8 Ā dēvara hodōṭakke bhattamūḍe 25 Ā dē
vara hottavarige dēvarige ga 150 bhatta mūḍe 30 hosatanārōgisu valli bha
tta mūḍe 40 kka ṭhāvina bhūmiya pratige bhattamūḍe
25 Aṁtu bhattamūḍe 140 Akṣāradalu nūra nālvattu mūḍe bha
tta yi bāḷiṁge sarvvamānyaveṁdu paṁcaliṁga dēvarige dhāreyaneṟa
du koṭṭadu yi dharma Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍaudeṁdu baradu naṭṭa śilā
śāsana yiṁtappadakke sākṣigaḷu taṁtrāḷuva nā tana Oppa maṇu
vūra mahādēvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā O hērēti vasuṁdha
rā ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāya jāyatē krimi . dānapālanayō
rmadhye dānāśreyonupālaṇā dānā svargamavāpnoti pālanādacata pada ©
maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.343 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
